note: Top banner rewritten around the SbPoW mining-key-label workflow. Replaces the stale 7,100-incident narrative with a focused, two-option setup guide (NEW dedicated wallet + label, or EXISTING wallet + label) including the exact sost-cli newwallet/getnewaddress/listaddresses/backup commands, the expected miner startup lines, and the lottery-eligibility caveat for brand-new addresses. Auto-reload within ~60 s on open tabs; Ctrl+Shift+R if cached.
